creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 185773
update to latest upstream v1.1.0; rename to zabbix3-libzbxpgsql

this patch should cleanly apply to the current libzbxpgsql port and do the following:

- update the port to the latest upstream v1.1.0
- rename the port to zabbix3-libzbxpgsql
